---
title: "cbt_data_analysis"
author: "Jinwei Zhang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r load xlsx data}
library(readxl)
df <- read_excel("data/cbtdata.xlsx")
names(df)
#head(df)
#str(df)
```

```{r remove the unrelated columns, keep k only}
library(tidyverse)
df_k <- df %>% 
  select(Semaine, K1A, K2A, K3A, K4A, K5A, K6A)
head(df_k)
```

```{r reshape to long format}
df_long <- df_k %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Semaine,
    names_to = "participant",
    values_to = "K"
  )

head(df_long)
str(df_long)
```

```{r check for missing values, if any, remove them}
sum(is.na(df_long$K))
colSums(is.na(df_k))
df_long <- df_long %>%
  drop_na(K)

sum(is.na(df_long$K))
head(df_long)
df_long %>%
  count(participant)
```

```{r plot K time series for each participant}
p1 <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Semaine, y = K)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ participant, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Weekly K time series by participant",
    x = "Week",
    y = "K"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 120, by = 20)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

p1
```

```{r create lagged K and check for consecutive weeks}
df_lag <- df_long %>%
  group_by(participant) %>%
  arrange(Semaine, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    prev_week = lag(Semaine),
    K_lag1 = lag(K),
    consecutive = (Semaine - prev_week == 1)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

head(df_lag, 15)

df_lag_valid <- df_lag %>%
  filter(consecutive == TRUE)

df_lag_valid %>%
  count(participant)

acf_results <- df_lag_valid %>%
  group_by(participant) %>%
  summarise(
    lag1_acf = cor(K, K_lag1, use = "complete.obs"),
    n_pairs = n()
  )

acf_results

```

```{r surrogate analysis}
set.seed(123)

n_surrogates <- 1000

surrogate_results <- df_lag_valid %>%
  group_by(participant) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    observed <- cor(.x$K, .x$K_lag1, use = "complete.obs")
    
    shuffled <- replicate(n_surrogates, {
      shuffled_K <- sample(.x$K)
      cor(shuffled_K, .x$K_lag1, use = "complete.obs")
    })
    
    tibble(
      observed_acf = observed,
      shuffled_mean = mean(shuffled, na.rm = TRUE),
      shuffled_sd = sd(shuffled, na.rm = TRUE),
      lower_2.5 = quantile(shuffled, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
      upper_97.5 = quantile(shuffled, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
      p_two_sided = mean(abs(shuffled) >= abs(observed), na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

surrogate_results
```

```{r plot surrogate results}
library(ggplot2)

p_surrogate <- ggplot(surrogate_results, aes(x = participant, y = observed_acf)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = lower_2.5, ymax = upper_97.5),
    width = 0.15,
    size = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Observed lag-1 correlation vs surrogate 95% interval",
    x = "Participant",
    y = "Lag-1 correlation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

p_surrogate

```
